items.name: synergy/orb
items.title: Orb
items.description: A 2D animated orb with audio reactivity, custom colors, and agent state visualization built with WebGL shaders.

items.name: synergy/background
items.title: Background (Synergy)
items.description: A pure WebGL background component using 3D Simplex noise to smoothly animate a 4-color gradient.

items.name: synergy/logo
items.title: Logo (Synergy)
items.description: The Synergy wordmark logo as an SVG component.

items.name: synergy/icon
items.title: Icon (Synergy)
items.description: The Synergy icon mark as an SVG component.
